title: Designed for wet fingers, bright sun and zero patience.
lede: Every detail tuned for the parking-lot moment between unzipping your boardbag and paddling out.

items.title: Skill Rating chart
items.body: Your last surf and your overall trend, on the home screen. The chart that motivates the paddle out tomorrow.

items.title: Session library
items.body: Every session saved by beach name and date. Tap any past surf to read your plan, see the map and the stars.

items.title: Set Timer
items.body: Tap as four sets roll in - Surf Reader gives you the average interval so you can be in position when the next one arrives.

items.title: Two planning modes
items.body: Guided 7-question flow when you want coaching, or freeform "I will…" notes when you already know the wave.

items.title: Coaching whispers
items.body: Subtle prompts, never lectures. The app teaches the loop on day one and disappears by day three - out of your way.

items.title: Offline-first
items.body: No reception in the dunes? Surf Reader doesn't care. Everything stored on-device. Your plans go with you, not to a cloud.
